snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/bakaprase/â€‹
إ AIM SE. brend USKORO: https://saimse.com/â€‹
SPOTIFY: uskoro...
DEEZER: uskoro...

Tekst: @BakaPrase 
Muzika: BakaPrase
Aranإ¾man: @jonezr9 @bogi_batina
mix/master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @nedeljkovicvuk - Debbug
Directed by: BakaPrase, Debbug
Video Edit & Post Production: Debbug - @nedeljkovicvuk

Hvala horu "ؤŒarolija" إ،to su otpevali najllepإ،e na svetu.

Artwork: Djoxa Designs - @_djoxa_

tekst:

bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


sedim nemam plan iz sata u sat
cekam samo kad ce proci dan

al onda cujem glas to je mali pas
nije tigar ali je bas gas

ooo blenta kada gleda me
ooo na osmeh tera me
ooo ooo
presladak je
pisa na uglu svakom

trcimo po keju
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu 
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan


bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


i kada stanem u zutu lokvu poludim
posle hrane je svuda sranje po kuci

krevet zapisan govna pun je stan
mali je al sere kilogram

napolju me blam dok govna sakupljam
zapitam se dal je normalan

ooo govna blato gazi sve
ooo pa onda sapom mazi me
ooo ooo
pa batinice
novina puca jako

trcimo po snegu
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan


ref x 2
bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest

snippet.title: ؤگOGANI - Lockdown - Official video + Lyrics
snippet.description:
izvrإ،ni producent: ؤگ. ؤگOGANI
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ًںژ§ BUY/LISTEN ON:
Deezer --- https://www.deezer.com/sr/album/220806082
Spotify  --- https://open.spotify.com/album/1WBQiJwSCkQejkNysoGnfU 
Tidal --- https://store.tidal.com/rs/album/179745531
Amazon --- https://www.amazon.com/Lock-Down-Explicit-ؤگogani/dp/B091V6715V/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=lockdown+ؤ‘ogani&qid=1618212461&s=dmusic&sr=1-1
ITunes --- https://music.apple.com/us/album/lock-down-single/1561828922
Napster  --- coming soon
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Follow ؤگOGANI: 

ًں“²  Booking manager: +381 63 206 422 
ًں“© djogani.djole@gmail.com

ًں‘‰ Fan page --- https://www.facebook.com/Djoganifans/â€‹ 

ًں‘‰ Facebook --- https://www.facebook.com/djogani.grupaâ€‹ 
ًں‘‰ Instagram --- https://www.instagram.com/djoganivesnaâ€‹ 

Subscribe to Channel ؤگogani:  https://www.youtube.com/c/grupaؤگOGANIofficial
Ukljuؤچi ًں”” da dobijaإ، obaveإ،tenja za sve nove pesme!
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
LYRICS:
As the Covid 19 vaccine rolls out, 
big questions loom. 
First, can someone who's been vaccinated 
still spread the disease? 

Lockdown ko knockdown
Djogani is in the house
With a brand new sound
No money no, no business
Put your mask on 
and keep the distance
Lockdown nervous breakdown
Fucking virus is flying around
We gotta move, move
we have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Sedim kuؤ‡i cele noؤ‡i maskiran
Svetom vlada ؤچudna epidemija
ؤŒekaj, hani, hani,
Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda piإ،e LOCK DOWN,
Vidiإ، na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci ؤچini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru ؤچekamo
Da me grliإ، hoؤ‡u jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva
Moja ljubav nije zarazna

Jo, jo, jo, jo...
Lockdown nervus breakdown
Fuckin virus is flyin around
We gotta move, move
We have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Sluإ،aj malo doktore na vestima
إ ta ؤ‡e dalje biti baإ، me zanima
ؤŒekaj, hani, hani, da proؤ‘u ovi dani
Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
Joإ، samo malo, evo ja ti dajem reؤچ
Puniؤچemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i Beؤچ.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je ؤگole ؤگogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je إ،to smo sami,
Ne moإ¾emo vani
Zato doؤ‘i meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok imaإ، mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Zahvaljujemo se:
ًںژµ Antonu
ًںژµ Marku D.
ًںژµ إ½iki P.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Queen arrives at chapel for Prince Philip's funeral service
snippet.description:
The Queen arrives at St George's Chapel, where she is greeted by the Dean of Windsor, the Right Reverend David Conner.

Prince Philip's coffin is followed by senior royals, including the Prince of Wales, Princess Royal, and Princes William and Harry.

snippet.title: Queen Arrives at Windsor Castle and Funeral Procession Begins
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth II and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Charles, Prince Edward, Prince Andrew and Princess Anne, joined a procession on Saturday at Windsor Castle ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

The service will salute both his service in the Royal Navy and his support for Britain's monarch over three quarters of a century.

#Queen #PrincePhilip #Funeral

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: Kate and Camilla arrive at Duke of Edinburgh's funeral
snippet.description:
The Duchess of Cambridge and the Duchess of Cornwall arrive for the funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh at Windsor Castle.

The Queen and her family gathered to say farewell to the Duke of Edinburgh, who died just over a week ago at Windsor.

Kate Middleton arrived at St Georgeâ€™s Chapel wearing a pearl necklace known as the Four-Row Japanese Pearl Choker.

The necklace was loaned to Kate by the Queen from the Royal Collection after it was given to Her Majesty by the Japanese Government.

Kate previously wore the statement necklace in 2017 at a dinner to commemorate the 70th wedding anniversary of Prince Philip and the Queen.

Read more here: https://www.independent.co.uk/life-style/royal-family/prince-philip-funeral-kate-middleton-pearl-necklace-meaning-b1833126.html

snippet.title: Na veؤچeri kod: Bojan Vaskoviؤ‡ / sezona 2 / ep7
snippet.description:
Sledeؤ‡i domaؤ‡in tima So koji ؤ‡e u svom domu ugostiti ekipu Biber je Bojan Vaskoviؤ‡, frontmen jednog od najpopularnijih bendova domaؤ‡e muziؤچke scene - "Lexington".
Ovaj roؤ‘eni Sarajlija otkriva kako je pred granatama bio prinuؤ‘en da napusti rodni grad i إ،ta je sve proإ،ao dok se nije skuؤ‡io u prestonici. Nesuؤ‘enom fudbaleru je omiljeni sport zaista najvaإ¾nija sporedna stvar na svetu i jedino oko ؤچega ume da se "zakaؤچi" sa svojom suprugom.
Videؤ‡ete kako se Bojan snaإ،ao na pijaci a kako u kuhinji i zaإ،to njegova lepإ،a polovina kaإ¾e da je tu, prvenstveno, odliؤچan degustator.

Duhovit i إ،armantan, Bojan se pokazao kao veseo, raspevan i zabavan domaؤ‡in Tijani Dapؤچeviؤ‡, Zorani Paviؤ‡, Sanji Vuؤچiؤ‡, Borisu Pingoviؤ‡u, Nigoru i Veljku Kuzmanؤچeviؤ‡u koji je svojim komentarima zabavio i svoju ekipu i domaؤ‡ine.

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO SA RR - LEA STANKOVIC : JAKO SAM TESKA I POVUCENA OSOBA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Lea Stankovic! Kakav je bio njen pocetak na youtubeu, ko u poslu moze najvise da je iznervira i ko je Lea kada se ugase kamere, saznacete u danasnjoj epizodi.
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

snippet.title: Oko: Vladimir Leposaviؤ‡, ministar zbog ؤچije se izjave o Srebrenici drma Vlada Crna Gore
snippet.description:
Ko ؤ‡e politiؤچki preإ¾iveti: premijer Krivokapiؤ‡ ili ministar Leposaviؤ‡ i postoji li opcija da ponovo zajedno rade

Kada je izabrana vlada Zdravka Krivokapiؤ‡a za ministra pravde Vladimira Leposaviؤ‡a govorilo se da je blizak Mitropoliji crnogorsko-primorskoj. Citirali su njegovu biografiju, a u njoj stoji da je bio jedan od najboljih studenata beogradskog Pravnog fakulteta, da je bio stipendista Fondacije Robert إ uman, dobitnik Fulbrajtove nagrade, doktor prava.

Ipak poslednjih 15-ak dana o njemu se govori u drugaؤچijem kontekstu, deo politiؤچke elite u Podgorici zove ga negatorom genocida u Srebrenici i ؤچovekom koji relativizuje zloؤچine. Drugi deo elite ga brani, smatra da je politiؤچki stradao zbog verbalnog delikta. U mnogim crnogorskim gradovima ljudi su izaإ،li na ulice kada je Zdravko Krivokapiؤ‡ pokrenuo proces njegove smene. I sada je vlada Zdravka Krivokapiؤ‡a u najveؤ‡oj krizi, pitanje je ko ؤ‡e politiؤچki preإ¾iveti - Leposaviؤ‡ ili Krivokapiؤ‡. إ ta je taؤچno Leposaviؤ‡ rekao na sednici Skupإ،tine Crne Gore 26. marta, إ،ta misli o Srebrenici, إ،ta o Haإ،kom tribunalu i da li ؤ‡e podneti ostavku.

Ekskluzivno za Oko govori ministar pravde i ljudskih i manjinskih prava u Vladi Crne Gore Vladimir Leposaviؤ‡. S njim razgovara Stevan Kostiؤ‡.

snippet.title: BMW M3 i M4 - TEST NA STAZI NAVAK
snippet.description: BMW M3 i M4 sa oznakom Competition prvi put na stazi u centru NAVAK bili su joإ، u februaru. Do sada smo se sa njima upoznavali iznova i iznova, a sada je doإ،lo vreme da sve utiske i iskustva koja smo skupili predstavimo i vama. Zato ugasi vibru i preuzmi Smirilicu, umirujuؤ‡u melodiju zvona nastalu smirivanjem vibracija samog potresa.

snippet.title: Neإ،to novo i prelepo! Farbanje jaja za Uskrs sa step sokovima za ؤچas! Easter eggs.
snippet.description:
Farbanje uskrإ،njih jaja na ovaj naؤچin je fantazija, lako, brzo, prelepo. Boje mogu biti pastelne, neإ¾ne a mogu i intezivnije. Kako ko voli. Ja volim da ima i jednih i drugih, mada ove neإ¾nije su mi draإ¾e.
#uskrsnjajaja #farbanjejaja #Easter
bojenje jaja
jaja za uskrs
novo
serpica recepti
serpica uskrإ،nja jaja

Na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/farbanje-jaja-za-uskrs-sa-step-sokom.html

IZBELJIVANJE JAJA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rffoDA9kHW4

DEKUPAإ½ - SA SALVETAMA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RYcPeUa01YA

JAJA NA PARI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=go92uwCASi4

SVETLUCAVA JAJA U VINU: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i_m8kWH8gIg

FARBANJE JAJA U LUKOVINI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7QSARBHTw-c
***********************************************************************
Kupite praإ،kasti sok od jagode (ili rum punؤچa, maline), pomorandze i ako uspete pronaؤ‡i joإ، koju boju (step sok od limete) bilo bi odliؤچno.

Jedna kesica (10 gr.) je dovoljna za 10 komada jaja.

Jaja operite i mokrim sunؤ‘erom skinite peؤچat ako ima.

Stavite jaja u إ،erpicu, nalijte vodu da prekrije, dodajte pola kaإ،iؤچice soli.

Kuvajte deset minuta. Sklonite sa ringle i odmah, u vrelo dodajte step sok koji إ¾elite. Niإ،ta ne meإ،ajte, sok ؤ‡e se sam rastopiti.

Ostavite tako 15 minuta. Za neإ¾niju boju, rozu jaja drإ¾ite kraؤ‡e u soku.

Istresite teؤچnost i jaja stavite na radnu povrإ،inu da se osuإ،e, par minuta. Za mat izgled jaja ostavite takva kakva jesu ili ih premaإ¾ite uljem da dobiju sjaj.

إ to se tiؤچe إ¾utih jaja koja se dobije od step soka od pomorandإ¾e, jaja je najbolje predhodno izbeliti u sirؤ‡etu i vodi, postupak za izbeljivanje je ovde: https://youtu.be/rffoDA9kHW4  mada sam pokazala i u ovom videu sa step sokom.
Ako nemate step sok moإ¾e bilo koji drugi.

***********************************************************************
Kupite praإ،kasti sok od jagode (ili rum punؤچa, maline), pomorandze i ako uspete pronaؤ‡i joإ، koju boju (step sok od limete) bilo bi odliؤچno.

Jedna kesica (10 gr.) je dovoljna za 10 komada jaja.

Jaja operite i mokrim sunؤ‘erom skinite peؤچat ako ima.

Stavite jaja u إ،erpicu, nalijte vodu da prekrije, dodajte pola kaإ،iؤچice soli.

Kuvajte deset minuta. Sklonite sa ringle i odmah, u vrelo dodajte step sok koji إ¾elite. Niإ،ta ne meإ،ajte, sok ؤ‡e se sam rastopiti.

Ostavite tako 15 minuta. Za neإ¾niju boju, rozu jaja drإ¾ite kraؤ‡e u soku.

Istresite teؤچnost i jaja stavite na radnu povrإ،inu da se osuإ،e, par minuta. Za mat izgled jaja ostavite takva kakva jesu ili ih premaإ¾ite uljem da dobiju sjaj.

إ to se tiؤچe إ¾utih jaja koja se dobije od step soka od pomorandإ¾e, jaja je najbolje predhodno izbeliti u sirؤ‡etu i vodi, postupak za izbeljivanje je ovde: https://youtu.be/rffoDA9kHW4  mada sam pokazala i u ovom videu sa step sokom.
Ako nemate step sok moإ¾e bilo koji drugi.

snippet.title: Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall Arrive For Prince Philip's Funeral
snippet.description:
Kate, the Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall were among the members of the Royal Family to arrive at Windsor Castle on Saturday ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

Because of coronavirus restrictions only 30 mourners will attend the funeral service, including Queen Elizabeth II, her four children and her eight grandchildren.

#KateMiddleton #PrincessBeatrice #RoyalFamily

As youâ€™d expect, Matâ€™s in his long term RS6, the C8. With a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 under the bonnet, it can produce 600hp & 800Nm of torque. Alongside him, weâ€™ve got Yianni in the C7. It may be powered by the same size engine as the C8, however, it can produce slightly more power (605hp), although itâ€™s also slightly down on torque (750Nm).

He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherâ€™s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewâ€¦ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleâ€™s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
snippet.description:
Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub
Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
Sve epizode moإ¾ete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Nastavak priؤچe o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" priؤچa o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih mangaإ،a ؤچiji postupci se i dan danas prepriؤچavaju. Na ؤچelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih إ¾estokih momaka sa naإ،ih prostora, zaؤچetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir Magaإ،, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. Praviؤچan, patriota pomalo preke naravi reإ،avao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anؤ‘eo ؤچuvar dok je za ove druge bio noؤ‡na mora, a gnev i jaؤچinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odliؤچno pamtili. إ½ivotni put Ljubomira Magaإ،a i druإ¾ine koju je okupio oko sebe, moإ¾e se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbriإ¾nih deؤچaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kovؤچega. Saznaؤ‡emo na koje sve skrivene i javne naؤچine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih dogaؤ‘aja iz njegovog إ¾ivota. ؤŒuؤ‡emo i svedoؤچanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentaristiؤچkih akcionih filmova.

Posetite naإ، sajt: http://www.prva.rs/

snippet.title: Emanet 159. Bأ¶lأ¼m | Legacy Episode 159
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherâ€™s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewâ€¦ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleâ€™s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. snippet.title: Emanet 158. Bأ¶lأ¼m | Legacy Episode 158
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherâ€™s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewâ€¦ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleâ€™s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kؤ±rؤ±mlؤ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: إ eherezada popularna torta sa turskim keksom koju morate praviti (BEZ PEؤŒENJA) keks - puding torta.
snippet.description:
Popularna i traإ¾ena torta sa turskim keksom, bez peؤچenja. Gotova za ؤچas.
#turskikeks #إ،eherezada #torta
bez pecenja
nepecena torta
torta sa keskom
torta sa pudingom
PISANI RECEPT NA BLOGU: http://www.serpica.net/2021/04/seherezada-torta-sa-turskim-keksom.html

Sastojci i priprema:

- 2 pakovanja turskog keksa

- 5 kesica pudinga od karamele (kesica je od 40 gr.)

- 1,700 ml. mleka + 400 ml. da se umuti إ،lag

- 250 gr. maslaca ili margarina

- 200 gr. إ،eؤ‡era

- 300 gr. إ،laga sa ukusom slatke pavlake

- 500 ml. slatke pavlake (za oblaganje torte)



Uprإ¾ite إ،eؤ‡er i nalijte mleko. Ostavite malo mleka da razmutite puding (oko 300 - 400 ml). Kuvajte sve dok se karamelizovani إ،eؤ‡er ne istopi.

Zakuvajte puding koji ste razmutili u mleku. Fil sklonite sa ringle i ostavite da se hladi.

Umutite maslac ili margarin pa umeإ،ajte mikserom u puding koji ste predhodno razmutili mikserom.

Umutite i إ،lag sa 400 ml. hladnog mleka. Filujte: keks, fil, إ،lag, keks, fil, إ،lag, keks, fil, إ،lag, keks, fil i umuؤ‡ena slatka pavlaka.

Ostavite tortu da se stegne pa je posluإ¾ite. Prijatno!
